project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18) - MFC
comment: Total have requested the equipment to mobilise back to Dan today. Melissa Hernandez will mobilise to Billund via Amsterdam this evening, for a 2pm check-in tomorrow

QELNG have informed Baker Hughes that there is discussion to mobilise to WHP-2(S) ~7-May. Personnel and equipment readiness date to be shared with Baker based on MEV and gate pass applications.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: MFC40 log completed and laid down toolstring at 9:05 local time. Data uploading to ANSA for analysis. Will continue with Post Calibration and Upload once complete. Slb to run Well Explorer.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Replacement MFC40 and clamps arrived on board yesterday. MFC40 and clamps for backload packed in container #44061 for Backload on next available boat.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slickline ran simulated drift for MFC40 and reached ~7950ft. Rigged up MFC40 to log from 6000ft. Battery connected @00:09, fingers set to close @08:19. Expect to upload data ~9:30 onwards (local time).

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slb finished milling earlier than expected but there were Delays in rigging over to slickline due to production issues. Currently in hole with the slickline brush. Expect to rig up for drift ~16:00 and MFC40 ~20:00 local time. Estimate for uploading data Monday morning at some point.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Slb milled and flowed the well yesterday for a few hours, then continued milling during the night shift. Expect to rig up MFC tomorrow (26/04/26) around 15:00. Confirmed FTA required. Replacement MFC40 could arrive tomorrow afternoon as well.

project: PRJ03244 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9850 - SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Equipment de-mob from the field at 8am KT
